summary: Completed testing of Quick Transfer (Hızlı Aktar) feature for Buse Kağıt Factory Management System. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass - dialog opens correctly, machine dropdown shows all 8 machines, transfer completes with success toast, audit log records the action.
passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/quick-transfer - simple pending job transfer (0 produced koli)
Backend API: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/quick-transfer - paused job with produced_koli > 0 (split scenario)
Backend API: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/quick-transfer - complete job when total produced >= koli_count
Backend API: Validation - reject transfer if job is in_progress
Backend API: Validation - reject transfer if job is completed
Backend API: Validation - reject if target_machine_id is missing (400)
Backend API: Validation - reject if job_id doesn't exist (404)
Backend API: Validation - reject if target_machine_id doesn't exist (404)
Backend API: Audit log records quick_transfer action with user name
Backend API: Job details preserved during split transfer (name, colors, notes)
Backend API: Transfer to same machine handled gracefully
Frontend: Plan panel login with emrecan/testtest12 works
Frontend: 'Aktar' button visible on pending job cards
Frontend: Quick Transfer dialog opens with correct job info (name, machine, koli)
Frontend: Machine dropdown lists all 8 machines
Frontend: Current machine marked as '(Mevcut)' in dropdown
Frontend: Optional 'Mevcut makinede yapılan koli' input field present
Frontend: 'Aktarımı Onayla' submit button works
Frontend: Success toast shows 'İş [machine] makinesine aktarıldı (X koli)'
Frontend: Dialog closes after successful transfer
Frontend: Job card updates to show new machine after transfer

scenarios.simple_transfer: No produced koli - just changes machine_id
scenarios.split_transfer: produced_koli > 0 - completes old job, creates new with remaining
scenarios.complete_transfer: total produced >= koli_count - marks job as completed

seed_data_creation: Test jobs created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Transfer (Hızlı Aktar) feature fully tested. The 'Aktar' button appears on pending job cards in the Plan panel. For paused jobs, a 'Hızlı Aktar' button appears in a separate 'Durdurulan İşler' section (only visible when paused jobs exist). The dialog shows job info, machine dropdown (8 machines), optional produced koli input, and submit button. Transfer scenarios: (1) simple transfer - just changes machine, (2) split transfer - completes old job with produced koli, creates new job with remaining on target machine, (3) complete transfer - if all koli produced, marks job as completed. Audit logs record all transfers with user name and details.
